name: KubeVirt_VMI_CPU
description: CPU performance metrics for KubeVirt Virtual Machine Instances
technology: Collects CPU metrics from Thanos/Prometheus for KubeVirt VMIs

dataPoints.name: vcpu_seconds_rate
dataPoints.description: vCPU time rate aggregated across all vCPUs (seconds/second)

dataPoints.name: vcpu_wait_rate
dataPoints.description: vCPU wait time rate - similar to vSphere CPU ready (seconds/second)
